Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class MyDomainSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MyDomainSettings2
public class MyDomainSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for MyDomainSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MyDomainSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CanOnlyLoginWithMyDomainUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoesApiLoginRequireOrgDomain" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DomainPartition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEdgeDuringRolloutEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsNativeBrowserForAuthOnAndroidEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsNativeBrowserForAuthOnIosEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsShareBrowserSessionAndroidForAuthEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsShareBrowserSessionIosForAuthEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LogRedirections" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MyDomainSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MyDomainName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MyDomainSuffix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RedirectForceComSiteUrls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RedirectPriorMyDomain" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Use3rdPartyCookieBlockingCompatibleHostnames" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UseEdge" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UseEnhancedDomainsInSandbox" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UseStabilizedMyDomainHostnames" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UseStabilizedSandboxMyDomainHostnames" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
